case_title: CLARA SAGE DAMES ET AL VS. DEVIN PALACIOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED JUN-18-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, DEVIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED JUN-18-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS DE OSORIO, MARIA LAURA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-03-2023 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUL-19-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLARA SAGE DAMES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MEGA DAMES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEVIN PALACIOS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA LAURA PALACIOS DE OSORIO IS PRESENT AND REQUEST AN INTERPRETER. MR. RODOLFO OSORIO, HUSBAND WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. BOTH PROOFS OF SERVICE ON FILE ARE UNTIMELY: DEFENDANT DEVIN PALACIOS BY 5 DAYS AND DEFENDANT MRS. PALACIOS DE OSORIO BY 15 DAYS. DEFENDANT PRESENT WILL NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF CLARA SAGE DAMES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MEGA DAMES IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEVIN PALACIOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA LAURA PALACIOS DE OSORIO IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA (#301593). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY DAMES, CLARA SAGE DAMES, MEGA AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, DEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAMES, CLARA SAGE DAMES, MEGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALACIOS, DEVIN PALACIOS DE OSORIO, MARIA LAURA $2,900.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,900.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
